"vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 2.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-284", "name": "Improper Access Control"}], "description": "### Impact

The users endpoint controller exposes a project's apiKey field to the logged-in user, provided they have permission for that endpoint. This only has impact if a project itself uses that specific field, Sulu itself does nothing with it and has no authentication per apiKey in its core.

### Patches

A patch is released with Version 2.6.23 and 3.0.5.

### Workarounds

Remove the field descriptor by patch the UserController.php File in Sulu Security Bundle.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9m6v-8fxc-4r44", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-18T17:34:06Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9m6v-8fxc-4r44", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9m6v-8fxc-4r44"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-18T17:34:06Z", "references": ["https://github.com/sulu/sulu/security/advisories/GHSA-9m6v-8fxc-4r44", "https://github.com/sulu/sulu/releases/tag/2.6.23", "https://github.com/sulu/sulu/releases/tag/3.0.6", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9m6v-8fxc-4r44"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/sulu/sulu/security-advisories/GHSA-9m6v-8fxc-4r44", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/sulu/sulu", "summary": "Sulu: Used API Keys may be available via Admin API", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-18T17:34:07Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9m6v-8fxc-4r44", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.0.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "sulu/sulu"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0-alpha1, <= 3.0.5"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.6.23", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "sulu/sulu"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.6.22"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Sulu: Used API Keys may be available via Admin API
